AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: This app provides random French insults with an accompanying tone level. Operational Patterns: - Call 'getFrenchInsult' directly; no setup or authentication call is required. - Insults are random: repeated calls return different insults. Constraints: - maxLevel must be 1 (family-friendly), 2 (adds vulgar), or 3 (adds offensive); levels are cumulative. - Insult text is in French.
